history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized graphic with a large circular user icon and centered red Indonesian text over a dark red, abstract background.

Main Subject:
In the center, there is a circular light gray icon with a smaller white circle inside and a white curved shape below, outlined by a red ring. Beneath the icon, bold red text reads “SELAMAT JALAN,” with additional centered white text lines below it and a red rounded pill-shaped label at the bottom.

Setting:
The image is an indoor/graphic-style poster or title card with no real-world scene; it features a dark red background with faint, overlapping abstract shapes and bokeh-like light circles.

Visual Details:
The overall color palette is dark maroon and red. The background is filled with semi-transparent abstract elements, including floral or leaf-like shapes and scattered small highlights, creating a layered, textured look. The layout is symmetrical and centered. The text “SELAMAT JALAN” appears in a large, bold, uppercase red font. Below it, “Sampai Jumpa Kembali” appears in white. Below that, a smaller gray line reads “Kayz x Hutao II Assisten [1]”. Near the bottom center, there is a red pill-shaped button-like element with white text reading “135 Left.” The camera is not applicable since this is a graphic design, and the framing is full-bleed.

Visible Text:
SELAMAT JALAN
Sampai Jumpa Kembali
Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [1]
135 Left

Practical Summary:
This image shows a centered title card with a circular icon and Indonesian text. It uses a dark red abstract background and a highlighted “135 Left” pill-shaped label.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
